author: doll-agent
content: Implemented index(arr, sub) and rindex(arr, sub) in ferray-strings::search. Both return Array<i64, D> of character indices. Unlike find/rfind (which return -1 on miss), index/rindex raise FerrayError::InvalidValue on the first miss — matching NumPy's str.index / str.rindex semantics. The miss error message includes the substring and the offending element.
